ODEz
    ODE problem
    Frw
__doc__rM
SimpleOscillatorz
    Free vibration of a simple oscillator::
        m \ddot{u} + k u = 0, u(0) = u_0 \dot{u}(0) \dot{u}_0
    Solution::
        u(t) = u_0*cos(sqrt(k/m)*t)+\dot{u}_0*sin(sqrt(k/m)*t)/sqrt(k/m)
    gq=
floatrh
tmpr#
SimpleOscillator.fc
omega
